title: Commodity markets fall as the economic backdrop deteriorates
section_path: Commodity markets fall as the economic backdrop deteriorates
section_path_text: Commodity markets fall as the economic backdrop deteriorates
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Worsening economic conditions in China and Europe created a risk-off tone across markets. Commodities came under pressure, with energy leading the complex lower. A stronger USD also weighed on investor appetite.
